notes: Phase 3 closed 2026-07-05. TUI shipped on sector/tui, merged --no-ff: ratatui/crossterm on stderr (stdout reserved for the print seam), query bar + ranked list + action menu overlay, empty-index/first-scan banners as render states, no-config banner, C0/C1 strip filter at the render boundary, trust prompt before alt-screen, tracing to $XDG_STATE_HOME/scout/scout.log in TUI mode. clap CLI wiring (default TUI, index, open-db, query).
